description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master and try-import branches and on pull requests. The workflow has three jobs: cpu-test and gpu-test running on a self-hosted environment with a custom container, and auto-merge running on ubuntu-latest if the reference is try-import. The cpu-test and gpu-test jobs check out the repository, prepare submodules, build MegEngine, and run Python and C++ tests. The auto-merge job checks out the repository, merges try-import with master, and pushes the result.
